cleavage agent: subjected to in-gel tryptic digestion using a DigestPro automated digestion unit
fractionation method: fractionated using a Dionex Ultimate 3000 nanoHPLC system
instrument: using an LTQ-Orbitrap Velos mass spectrometer
ionization type: Peptides were ionized by nano-electrospray ionization at 2.1 kV
labeling: the resulting peptides were fractionated using a Dionex Ultimate 3000 nanoHPLC system in line with an LTQ-Orbitrap Velos mass spectrometer
